path: Problem: Calculate change from the most recent prior record within the same group/category (e.g., serial number) up to the current row

Action: Use LOOKUP with a boolean-to-numeric array (1/(criteria_range=criteria)) to return the last matching value in a growing range; wrap with IFERROR for first occurrence handling; subtract current value

Observation: LOOKUP(2, ...) returns the last numeric result in the lookup vector, so converting TRUE/FALSE to 1/error isolates matching rows and yields the most recent prior match when using an expanding range ending at the row above
